name: Find a book with name in different font cases in LYRASIS
fullName: Search libraries and books: Find a book with name in different font cases in LYRASIS

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "LYRASIS Reads" on Add library screen
And  Enter word silk road and save as 'info' on catalog books screen
Then  The first book has 'info' bookName on catalog books screen

labels.value: Find a book with name in different font cases in LYRASIS
